creator: insane@lunatic.oneinsane.net
text:
During the upgrade of the xchat port to 1.6 and it moving from xchat-devel to
xchat in the ports tree the compile with SSL switch was left out

Fix: 

add the below to the Makefile of /usr/ports/xchat/Makefile:

+.if defined(WITH_SSL)
+USE_OPENSSL=           YES
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=       --enable-openssl
+.endif
+
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to compile xchat
